configurations.name: sizzle
runtimeArgs: const http=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const base=path.join('C:\\Users\\Oculus\\My Drive\\Female Agent\\sizzle');const mime={'html':'text/html','css':'text/css','js':'application/javascript','png':'image/png','jpg':'image/jpeg','svg':'image/svg+xml','json':'application/json','woff2':'font/woff2','woff':'font/woff','ttf':'font/ttf'};http.createServer((q,r)=>{let u=q.url==='/'?'/output.html':q.url;let fp=path.join(base,decodeURIComponent(u));try{const d=fs.readFileSync(fp);const ext=path.extname(fp).slice(1);r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':mime[ext]||'application/octet-stream'});r.end(d)}catch(e){r.writeHead(404);r.end('Not found')}}).listen(3457,()=>console.log('Sizzle serving on 3457'))
